title: Velvet Rose & Oud Luxury Reed Diffuser Refill 200ml + 10 Replacement Fibre Reeds - Highly Scented & Long Lasting
features: Velvet Rose & Oud Reed Diffuser Refill (200ml) + 10 Replacement Reeds: A beautifully deep and enriching scent with damask rose enveloped in smoky oud wood.
Highly Fragranced and Long Lasting: One of our strong scented reed diffuser refills on average lasts up to 4 months (this can vary depending on room placement and how often you flip the reeds).

Stylish Packaging & Easy to Use: Simply unscrew the lid and then refill your diffuser bottle to the desired level, place your reeds in the liquid and enjoy the wonderful aroma. Outer cardboard box is fully recyclable.
Made in the UK: Our reed diffuser refills are made using the highest quality ingredients, hand-made in Warwickshire UK by a small family run business.
The Perfect Gift: Our reed diffuser refills make the perfect gifts for women, birthday gifts for her, wedding gifts, candle gifts for women, teacher gifts and hamper gifts.
description: Directions Unscrew the lid, refill the diffuser bottle to the desired level, place the reeds in the liquid, and enjoy the aroma. Safety Warning Keep reeds out of reach of children and pets. Use in a well-ventilated area.
